{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Starhammer's self-identity
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer's self-identity]] is a function of the [[Aether]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41">''The Engineer'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“His self-identity is a function of the Aether, so she couldn’t control the small details.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c41" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
